final:
module top_module (
    input clk,
    input reset_n,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (!reset_n)
            q <= 4'b1111; // Synchronous reset to '1111'
        else
            q <= q - 1; // Decrement counter
    end

endmodule
